questions.question_text: Anytime the unit Is not being used, it is stored in a secure, locked area.
Anytime the unit Is not being used, it is stored in a secure, locked area. - Further actions needed

Whilst practice is closed, it should be stored out of site in a locked theft-proof cabinet.

If possible, the battery is removed from the main unit and stored separately in the main unit when not in use.
